_comment: Edit this file to update the portfolio. Text, images, and links below are read by index.html on page load. After editing, just reload the page (the site must be served over http — e.g. `python3 -m http.server`).

hero.tagline: Product Photography · Social Media Marketing · Videography
hero.description: Helping brands look good and sell more through conversion-focused visual content. Based in Lahore, Pakistan.
hero.imageAlt: Shahzaib Rafique, creative marketer and photographer at work

services.heading: What I Do
services.subheading: Strategic visual services designed to elevate your brand.

items.title: Product Photography
items.description: Clean, conversion-focused shots tailored for e-commerce platforms and social media product features.

items.title: Social Media Marketing
items.description: End-to-end content creation, strategy planning, and campaign management to build community and drive sales.

items.title: Videography
items.description: Engaging short-form video content, Instagram Reels, TikToks, and dynamic product showcase videos.

about.heading: About Me
about.lead: Creative marketer blending marketing strategy with visual craft — a BBA Marketing student at the University of Central Punjab (UCP).
about.body: I believe great visuals shouldn't just look pretty — they need to perform. My approach combines an editorial eye with marketing fundamentals like consumer behaviour and brand strategy to create content that stops thumbs and drives conversions.
about.imageAlt: Portrait of Shahzaib Rafique holding a camera
whyPoints: Quick learner & adaptable to brand guidelines
Creative eye for engaging, trend-aware content
Strong communicator throughout the project lifecycle

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.subheading: Ready to elevate your brand's visual presence? Get in touch to discuss your next project.
